title: Notification
doc_html:
§974.7. Notification

            Upon receiving the electronic transfer of information from the office of the state register, as provided in R.S. 49:961, the commercial division of the Department of State shall perform all of the following items:

            (1) By the fifteenth day of the month, the commercial division shall post information on the internet page of the commercial division under the heading of "Proposed State Rules and Regulations that May Affect Your Business".

            (2) No later than the sixteenth day of the month, the division shall electronically transfer the information to the Louisiana Association of Business and Industry, the Louisiana Chapter of the National Federation of Independent Business, and to each person who has made a timely request of the department for this information.

            Acts 2008, No. 820, §1; Acts 2019, No. 204, §1, eff. Feb. 1, 2020; Acts 2022, No. 663, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 49:978.7.
doc_text:
§974.7.  Notification
Upon receiving the electronic transfer of information from the office of the state
register, as provided in R.S. 49:961, the commercial division of the Department of State shall
perform all of the following items:
(1)  By the fifteenth day of the month, the commercial division shall post information
on the internet page of the commercial division under the heading of "Proposed State Rules
and Regulations that May Affect Your Business".
(2)  No later than the sixteenth day of the month, the division shall electronically
transfer the information to the Louisiana Association of Business and Industry, the Louisiana
Chapter of the National Federation of Independent Business, and to each person who has
made a timely request of the department for this information.
Acts 2008, No. 820, §1; Acts 2019, No. 204, §1, eff. Feb. 1, 2020; Acts 2022, No.
663, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 49:978.7.
